fields.name: Table ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the table that the template applies to.

fields.name: Template Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the config template that should be applied

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description for the API template selection.

fields.name: Order
fields.tooltip: Specifies the order of the entry.

fields.name: Page ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the API web service page that the template applies to.
